_note: Blob SHA of anthropics/anthropic-sdk-typescript/.stats.yml — a file generated from Anthropic's OpenAPI spec, so a change here tracks /v1/messages wire-contract drift. When the external-drift watcher flags this, review the SDK diff, reconcile src/lib/models/anthropic-types.ts, then bump this SHA in the same PR. Get the current value with: gh api repos/anthropics/anthropic-sdk-typescript/contents/.stats.yml --jq .sha
